CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-19-2017 Set For Trial On Nov-06-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar May-03-2017 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2016 Continued To May-03-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Vacate Entry Of Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-16-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Attorney Kavita Sharma for Defendants Robert and Christine Yrani the moving party.
Attorney Albert L. Boasberg for Plaintiff Marie S. Bonney the opposing party.

After hearing arguments from both parties in the matter of DEFENDANT ROBERT YRANI, CHRISTINE YRANI Notice Of Motion To Vacate Entry Of Default And Default Judgment; the Court takes this matter under submission.
